text:
sharing group data 

COMMENT: Beneficiaries who are deemed eligible for fully subsidized Part D coverage due to dual enrollment in 
Medicare-Medicaid have a cost-share group code of 01, 02, or 03 for the month. Beneficiaries who are 
not dually enrolled but are eligible for a full LIS subsidy are classified as 04. Other beneficiaries who 
are eligible for the LIS but do not receive a full subsidy have a 05, 06, 07, or 08. The remaining values 
indicate that the individual is not eligible for
